landing.socialGraphDesc: Urkio maps human connection beyond empty metrics. Our living social graph is designed for Healing (التشافي) and Safe Connectivity (الاتصال الآمن). Build a resilient personality and bridge isolated hurdles into supportive society.

aboutManifesto: Official Introduction & Manifesto | Edition One (Public Beta)
aboutVisionTitle: 1. The Vision: A Sanctuary for Human Growth
aboutVisionDesc:
In a world increasingly dominated by digital noise and superficial interactions, Urkio emerges as a sanctuary for genuine personal evolution. We believe that true self-development does not happen in isolation; it flourishes within a structured environment built on authentic human connection.

Our slogan, "Your Journey Within," reflects our core mission: to provide the tools and the community necessary for a profound exploration of your inner potential. Urkio is a social development ecosystem designed to bridge the gap between individual ambition and collective human wisdom.
aboutNetworkTitle: 2. The Great Network: Connecting Experts and Seekers
aboutNetworkDesc: Urkio is engineered to be a high-integrity bridge. We are building a "Great Network" where users connect deeply with Social Architects, Mentors, and Specialists. Through innovative features like our voice-driven feeling records (Homii) and secure professional messaging, we foster Real Relations for Real Humanity. This is a space where professional expertise meets the raw beauty of human vulnerability.
aboutScopeNonMedicalDesc: Urkio is a developmental and social platform, not a medical or psychiatric facility. We do not provide clinical diagnoses, medical treatments, or pharmaceutical prescriptions. Our focus is strictly on mentorship, social support, and life-coaching.
aboutScopeNonFinancialDesc: Our primary goal is the creation of a high-value human network. Urkio is not a platform for financial collection or monetary transactions; it is a gateway for human capital and intellectual exchange.
aboutEditionDesc: Urkio is currently in Edition One, operating as a Public Beta Test. This is a deliberate period of growth where we refine our features and community dynamics. By participating, you are a foundational member of a network preparing for a Major Global Launch.
aboutLegalLiabilityDesc: Urkio, its founders, and affiliates are not responsible for any bad behavior, misconduct, or individual actions of its users or experts.
aboutLegalGuidanceDesc: Any information shared is for developmental purposes. Urkio is not liable for personal or professional outcomes resulting from the use of the platform.
aboutLegalComplianceDesc: This platform operates in accordance with International Digital Services Laws and Local Jurisdictional Regulations. Harassment, defamation, or illegal activities will result in immediate termination of access.
aboutLegalRiskDesc: As a Beta software, users participate at their own risk regarding the evolving nature of the platform.
aboutClosing: Step into Urkio—where your internal evolution meets a world of real connection.
visionPreview: Urkio Vision: Exclusive preview coming soon for verified partners.
keynoteStreaming: Final Keynote: Streaming globally on Launch Day. Pre-register to attend.

clinical.howToAccess: How to access the Admin Portal
clinical.signUpDesc: Use your secret admin registration passcode to create an account.
clinical.contactLead: Contact Foundation lead for this code.
clinical.portalSecuredDesc: This portal is secured and maintained for the Urkio Platform. Access is monitored for security and compliance.
clinical.guide1Desc: Access is restricted to accounts with the admin role. Authorized personnel can create an admin account using the registration feature.
clinical.guide2Desc: Enter the email address registered with administrative privileges on the Urkio Platform.
clinical.guide3Desc: Use your strong unique password. For security concerns or resets, contact the Urkio platform lead.
clinical.guide4Desc: Once verified, you will be redirected to the Admin Command Center where you can monitor real-time activity, users, income, and cases.

terms.title: Terms of Service & Privacy Agreement - Urkio Platform
terms.subtitle: Edition One - Beta System
terms.welcome: Welcome to Urkio; your journey within and your gateway to social impact. By using this platform, you acknowledge your full and unconditional agreement to the following terms:
terms.section1_item1: Urkio is a human connection network and a platform for social and psychological development. It is not a medical or financial institution.
terms.section1_item2: All available tools (including the AI assistant Homii) are designed to provide self-development support and motivation and are not a substitute for specialized professional medical advice.
terms.section2_item1: The laws and regulations of the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, particularly the "Personal Data Protection Law" (PDPL) issued by the Saudi Data and AI Authority (SDAIA), serve as the primary reference and governing principle for this agreement and the platform's technical architecture.
terms.section3_desc: Urkio commits to complying with the local laws of every Arab country where the service is provided, aligning technical and legal standards according to each region, including:
terms.section3_syria: Syrian Arab Republic: Compliance with Anti-Cybercrime laws and national data protection and information exchange standards.
terms.section3_egypt: Egypt: Compliance with the Personal Data Protection Law No. 151 of 2020.
terms.section3_uae: United Arab Emirates: Compliance with the Federal Decree-Law on Personal Data Protection.
terms.section3_others: Jordan, Maghreb Countries, and all other Arab Nations: The platform adheres to all prevailing national regulations to ensure the highest levels of privacy.
terms.section4_item1: We are committed to encrypting and protecting your sensitive data (textual, vocal, and psychological).
terms.section4_item2: This data is stored according to the highest cybersecurity standards to ensure it is only accessible by you or specialists authorized by you.
terms.section4_item3: You have the right to access, correct, or permanently delete your data upon closing your account.
terms.section5_item1: In alignment with Arab regional regulations, registration for users under the age of 18 is prohibited without explicit guardian consent obtained through the platform's verified protocol.
terms.section6_item1: The Urkio logo, animations, and software are exclusive private property.
terms.section6_item2: It is strictly forbidden to use the platform to publish content that incites hatred or violates the public values and morals followed in the Arab region.
terms.section7_item1: As a user of "Edition One," you understand that the platform is in a continuous state of development. We reserve the right to update these terms to reflect legal and technical advancements.
terms.declarationText: "I hereby declare that I have read the Urkio Terms of Service. I voluntarily consent to the processing of my data in accordance with the Saudi PDPL and the mentioned regional standards, and I commit to all privacy and conduct guidelines stated above."

agent.title: Urkio Guide
agent.subtitle: Your Intelligent Companion
agent.welcome: Welcome to your personal growth sanctuary. I am your Urkio Guide, here to navigate your inner world with empathy and professional insight. How are you feeling today?
agent.inputPlaceholder: Type your message or use voice command...
agent.developerNotice: AI Intelligence active · Professional grounding enabled
agent.error: Sorry, a small connection hiccup. We are still with you, please try again.
agent.voiceRecording: Recording... I'll respond when you stop

mockResponses.general: I hear you clearly. Your journey matters to me, and I'm here to support you every step of the way.
mockResponses.panic: Take a deep breath... you are safe now. I am with you, let's focus on the calm of the present moment.
mockResponses.anxiety: It's natural to feel anxious sometimes. Let's talk about what's on your mind, and I'll try to help ease the weight.
mockResponses.depression: I appreciate your courage in sharing how you feel. Remember that you are not alone, and light always finds its way back.
